name: Kreatopitta Horiatiki (Country-style Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion and rinse it in a strainer under running water; drain.
2. Mix garlic with parsley, mint, salt, and pepper.
3. Slice the hard cooked eggs thinly.
4. Cut the lamb from the bone and into very small pieces (about the same size as ground beef).
5. Lightly brown the lamb with the chopped onion in about 1/3 of the butter.
6. Add tomato paste, salt, pepper, garlic mixture, and mint to the lamb; mix well.
7. Simmer for about 30 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the grated Kefalotiri cheese and beaten eggs.
9. Melt the remaining butter.
10. Butter a baking pan that is approximately 2 inches smaller than the phyllo sheets.
11. Place 9 phyllo sheets on the bottom of the pan, buttering each well before laying them in place.
12. Do not pre-cook the phyllo sheets.
13. Pour the meat mixture over the phyllo, spreading it evenly.
14. Arrange the sliced eggs on top of the meat.
15. Fold the overhanging edges of the phyllo sheets onto the filling; butter them well.
16. Add the remaining phyllo sheets to form the top crust, buttering each sheet before using it.
17. Score the top lightly into serving-size pieces with a sharp, pointed knife.
18. Drizzle any remaining butter over the pie.
19. Bake in a preheated 300°F (150°C) oven for about 1 hour.
20. Let cool for 30 minutes; cut through and serve. Serves 8 to 10.
